data.name: A Futanari SPAT in my MOUTH!
data.detailed_description:
Futa on Male

If the loneliness wasn't enough to keep you up at night, the coffee sure didn't help. Feeling the effects of a full moon, you go out seeking adventure or pizza.

Pizza seemed like a bad idea so you ended up at a bar. A single patron occupied the fine establishment, and as luck would have it, she was reluctant for some company. After hitting it off you hop onto the back of her Harley and speed off into the night.

Hindsight is 20/20. 😉

Read through some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay
  • Kinetic Visual Novel
  • H-Scenes
  • ~4K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
